name: KitchenOwl
short_desc: Self-hosted grocery list and recipe manager
author: Tom Bursch
description: KitchenOwl keeps grocery lists and recipes organized with shared access, meal planning, and a responsive web UI.

form_fields.label: Frontend URL
form_fields.hint: Full URL where KitchenOwl is accessed. Must match exactly the domain configured in Runtipi (e.g., https://kitchenowl.example.com for exposed apps, or http://kitchenowl.local for local network)
